metadata.name: Invoice Processing ALF Rule Base
metadata.description: Structured Rule Base for the Adaptive Learning Framework. Conditions are deterministic. Actions call Gemini Pro to continue the pipeline from where the acting agent terminated early. Rules derived from AGENT_ISSUES_INVESTIGATION.md.
metadata.author: Expert-Led (Phase 1)
metadata.action_model: Hybrid: deterministic conditions + LLM-driven actions (Gemini Pro)
